name: toyoura-nagisa
description: Toyoura Nagisa - LLM-Driven PFC Simulation Assistant

scripts.dev:backend: cd packages/backend && uv run python run.py
scripts.build:all: npm run build:core && npm run build:web && npm run build:cli
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:web
scripts.kill:backend: pkill -9 -f 'python.*run.py' 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'uvicorn' 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:9000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ Backend processes killed'
scripts.kill:web: lsof -ti:5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ Web processes killed'
scripts.kill:all: npm run kill:backend && npm run kill:web
